title: Pantai Lima Estate — Three Beachfront Villas, Canggu
note: Whole estate · per villa per night
blurb: A four-acre beachfront estate of three standalone luxury villas — Ambra and Melissa on the water's edge, Mary against the rice fields — sharing a night-lit tennis court and a minute's boardwalk to the beach, each fully staffed with chefs and butlers.
detail:
Pantai Lima Estate comprises three standalone luxury villas extending across more than 1.6 hectares — four acres, the size of two football fields. Villa Ambra and Villa Melissa sit right on the water's edge, while Villa Mary is set back against the rice fields with sweeping views of the ocean and the river at its side. All three are just a minute's walk to the beach via a short boardwalk.

Book a single villa or the whole estate: together the three villas sleep up to 36 guests across as many as 15 bedrooms, making Pantai Lima ideal for large gatherings, corporate retreats, weddings and celebrations that need privacy and scale. Each villa offers its own private pool, expansive indoor-outdoor living and beautifully manicured gardens overlooking the black-sand beach.

The estate is headed by a villa manager, and each villa has its own dedicated team — chefs, butlers, attendants and security — for a hassle-free holiday. Shared facilities include a private tennis court with night lighting, while in-villa spa treatments, yoga and a full slate of tours can be arranged on request.
